tweets.text:
I’ve lost several thousand followers over the last several weeks.

I started sharing what I woke up to about Strategy after seeing the constant lies and inconsistencies from Saylor and the rest of the leadership team.

My main goal has been to try and wake up anyone else I can that was blinded by them pressing the buy button for years to the fact that what they’re doing isn’t healthy for the industry (at least the way they’re doing it) and that Bitcoin is more than one man and company.

For anyone saying I’m doing it for engagement  - I easily could get more engagement just dickriding Saylor.

If you’re bullish on Bitcoin, just buy BTC.

thread_tweets.text:
Just saw all of this.

Not sure what benchmark I made in the first place.

Never mentioned anything with a price comparison to BTC for STRC in the first place because it should be incredibly obvious it outperforms while BTC is going lower lol. I just basically said “we’ll see if this is enough on a long turn basis to return STRC to the $100 peg”.

So I felt like a comparison to a MMF was pretty fair as a benchmark comparison for how STRC performs relative to the standard for its product.
